digest.component_or_area: plan-review gate protocol guidance in agent-facing docs
key_entities: apply the ones that genuinely improve the plan
not a mandate to remediate every advisory
propositions: CLAUDE.md's plan-review protocol mandates agents remediate all valid advisory findings even on a PASS, which the operator wants loosened.
The mandatory remediation loop drove a 4+-round tail consuming 60% of gate compute, with 95% of remediation edits minting new findings.
Replace the must-remediate-all-advisories mandate with neutral judgment framing that keeps the BLOCK-verdict-must-be-remediated-and-re-reviewed rule intact.
Two genuine echoes of the mandate in rebar-implement and rebar-brainstorm SKILL.md must be softened to the same judgment framing while keeping their block-remediation instruction.
The rebar-janitor Remediation Plan phase and rebar-implement's completion-verifier close gate (line 254) are non-echoes and stay untouched.
Sign-every-round guidance and completion-verifier protocol remain verbatim/unchanged; observation plan lives on the parent epic, not here.
